hero.subtext: At Rij2Go you learn to drive at your own pace. Personal attention, modern lesson cars and flexible lesson times that fit your schedule. Active in Amsterdam, Zaandam and Almere.

pakketten.name: Quick Start
pakketten.description: Get started right away with 10 lessons of 60 minutes. Ideal if you already have some driving experience.

pakketten.name: Package A
pakketten.description: 15 lessons of 60 minutes. Ideal for students with a little driving experience.

pakketten.name: Package B
pakketten.description: The perfect package for most students. 25 lessons of 60 min including CBR exam.

pakketten.name: Package C
pakketten.description: Thorough practice with 35 lessons of 60 min. Including CBR practical exam.

pakketten.name: Package D
pakketten.description: Maximum support. 45 lessons of 60 min including CBR exam and free resit.

faq.vraag: How much does a single driving lesson cost?
faq.antwoord: A single 60-minute lesson costs €70. However, we recommend choosing a package, because the larger the package, the bigger the discount. Contact us and we will advise you which package suits you best.

faq.vraag: In which areas do you provide driving lessons?
faq.antwoord: We provide driving lessons in Amsterdam, Zaandam and Almere. We pick you up at an agreed location: at home, at work or at the bus stop. Not sure if we operate in your area? Drop us a message on WhatsApp!

faq.vraag: How long does it take on average to pass my driving exam?
faq.antwoord: That differs per person. On average, our students get their licence after 20 to 30 lessons. Some students are ready after 15 lessons, others need 40. Together we draw up an honest and realistic learning plan.

faq.vraag: Can I also take lessons in an automatic car?
faq.antwoord: Yes, absolutely! We offer lessons in both a manual and an automatic car. Please note that an automatic licence does not permit you to drive a manual car. We will discuss together what is the best choice for you.

faq.vraag: What if I fail my driving exam?
faq.antwoord: Didn't pass? Don't panic — it happens to the best of us. We analyse the feedback report from the CBR together and train specifically on the points that need improvement. A resit costs €349. The larger your package, the better prepared you are — and the smaller the chance of a resit.

faq.vraag: Can I cancel or reschedule lessons?
faq.antwoord: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule lessons free of charge up to 48 hours in advance. For cancellations within 48 hours we charge a fee of €29. We understand that life sometimes takes a different turn — just let us know in time.

faq.vraag: When do I need to take my theory exam?
faq.antwoord: The CBR requires you to pass your theory exam before you can take your practical exam. We recommend starting to study for theory as early as possible — ideally at the same time as your first practical lessons. That way you won't fall behind when you are ready for the driving exam.

faq.vraag: From what age can I take driving lessons?
faq.antwoord: You can take your theory exam from age 16. Driving lessons start from age 16.5 and you may take your practical exam from age 17. Want to start as early as possible? Get in touch — we will plan everything as efficiently as possible for you.

faq.vraag: Do you also offer support for students with driving anxiety or ADHD?
faq.antwoord: Absolutely. Our instructors have experience with students who suffer from driving anxiety, exam nerves, ADHD or autism. We fully adapt the lesson pace, communication style and approach to your situation. Gradually building confidence, step by step — so you enter your exam with confidence.

Yes! Do you live in Amsterdam, Zaandam or Almere but prefer to speak English? No problem. We also provide lessons in English. Contact us via WhatsApp or email — we will find the best matching instructor for you.

faq.vraag: How long is a lesson and can I take longer lessons?
faq.antwoord: A standard lesson at Rij2Go lasts 60 minutes. In consultation it is also possible to plan longer lessons of 90 or 120 minutes — ideal if you want to progress quickly or want an intensive preparation for your exam. Just discuss this with your instructor.

voordelen.title: Personal Attention
voordelen.description: At Rij2Go, you are central. Our experienced instructors adapt to your pace and learning style. Whether you are a beginner or already have some experience, you always feel at ease.

voordelen.title: Modern Lesson Cars
voordelen.description: We drive exclusively in modern, safe vehicles fully equipped with the latest technology. Comfortable, reliable and with dual controls for extra safety.

voordelen.title: Flexible Lesson Times
voordelen.description: Schedule your lessons whenever it suits you. Evening, weekend and morning lessons are all possible in Amsterdam, Zaandam and Almere. We adapt to your agenda.

voordelen.title: Fast Lesson Packages
voordelen.description: Want to get your licence as quickly as possible? Our intensive packages are specially designed for students who want to drive efficiently and purposefully towards their licence.

specialeBegeleiding.title: ADHD & Autism
specialeBegeleiding.description: Our instructors are trained in guiding students with ADHD or autism. We fully adapt the lesson pace, instruction style and structure to your needs. You drive your way — we provide the right approach.

specialeBegeleiding.title: Driving Anxiety & Exam Nerves
specialeBegeleiding.description: Suffering from driving anxiety or nerves before your exam? We start calmly, build confidence step by step and practise in a safe environment. Many of our students who had previously failed passed with us.

specialeBegeleiding.title: Automatic Licence
specialeBegeleiding.description: Prefer an automatic? We understand. Automatic transmission lessons are available in all our packages — for the same price. We help you choose: automatic or manual, what suits you best?

specialeBegeleiding.title: Lessons in English
specialeBegeleiding.description: Do you live in Amsterdam, Zaandam or Almere but prefer to speak English? No problem. We offer driving lessons in English, so the language barrier is no obstacle on the way to your licence.

instructeurs.beschrijving: Fee became a driving instructor because he believes that everyone, regardless of background or challenge, can learn to drive. With more than 12 years of experience he has guided hundreds of students — from beginners to people who had failed multiple times. His calm approach and clear explanations make him especially popular with students with driving anxiety or ADHD.

Fee is known for his patience and structured approach. He works intensively on exam training and knows exactly what the CBR looks for. Many of his students pass on the first attempt. He speaks fluent Dutch, English and French.

testimonials.tekst: After two failed attempts at another driving school I tried Rij2Go. What a difference! The instructor explained everything calmly and had a lot of patience. After 20 lessons I passed first time. Absolutely recommended!
Great driving school. I suffered from driving anxiety but it has completely disappeared thanks to the calm approach. Done in 15 lessons, passed immediately. The best investment I have made!
Fee is truly a top instructor. She knows exactly what to pay attention to for the CBR exam. I felt super well prepared. Passed first time! The price is also very fair.
I have ADHD and was worried that would be a problem, but the instructor adapted his style perfectly to me. Short instructions, lots of repetition. Eventually passed after 32 lessons. Super happy!
I already had driving experience from abroad and wanted to get my Dutch licence quickly. The first lesson was immediately clear and honest about what I needed. Passed after 12 lessons. Top service!
Flexible lesson times are truly a must when you work full time. I could come in the evenings and at weekends. Instructor always on time, professional and motivating. Passed first time!

werkwijze.title: Introduction
werkwijze.description: We start with a first 60-minute lesson. You get to know your instructor, we drive together and draw up a personal learning plan.

werkwijze.title: Theory Study
werkwijze.description: While you take practical lessons, you also prepare for the theory exam. We offer online theory support, practice exams and tips to pass quickly.

werkwijze.title: Practical Lessons
werkwijze.description: You take tailor-made lessons — from basic skills to complex traffic situations. We train you specifically for the CBR exam requirements in Amsterdam, Zaandam or Almere.

werkwijze.title: Pass Your Exam!
werkwijze.description: When you are ready, we guide your CBR exam registration and drive the exam route together. After obtaining your licence you are truly ready for the road.

pakketten.advice: Not sure? Contact us for personal advice.
pakketten.heading: Choose your package
pakketten.subtext: Transparent prices with no hidden costs. The more lessons, the bigger the discount.
pakketten.looseTarievenDesc: Individual lessons, exams and tests — without a package.
